queries.sql: SELECT load_tier, COUNT(*) AS cnt, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95_tput FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN load_factor < 30.0 THEN 'light' WHEN load_factor < 65.0 THEN 'moderate' ELSE 'heavy' END AS load_tier, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND load_factor IS NOT NULL) sub GROUP BY load_tier ORDER BY load_tier ASC

WITH total_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), auto_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS auto_events FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode = 'auto' GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT tc.facility_zone, tc.total_events, COALESCE(ac.auto_events, 0) AS auto_events, ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(ac.auto_events, 0) AS FLOAT) / CAST(tc.total_events AS FLOAT) * 100.0, 2) AS auto_pct FROM total_counts tc LEFT JOIN auto_counts ac ON tc.facility_zone = ac.facility_zone ORDER BY auto_pct DESC
SELECT pallet_id, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC

SELECT derived.facility_zone, derived.avg_tput, derived.cnt FROM (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone) AS derived WHERE derived.avg_tput > 300.0 ORDER BY derived.avg_tput DESC

SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) AS zone_avg FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

WITH ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sorter_model ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, rn FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY sorter_model, rn

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), mode_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS mode_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), ranked_modes AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, mode_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY mode_cnt DESC) AS rn FROM mode_stats) SELECT zs.facility_zone, zs.cnt, zs.avg_tput, zs.avg_temp, rm.operation_mode AS top_mode, rm.mode_cnt FROM zone_stats zs JOIN ranked_modes rm ON zs.facility_zone = rm.facility_zone AND rm.rn = 1 ORDER BY zs.avg_tput DESC

WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND load_factor IS NOT NULL), stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS mu, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate * throughput_rate) - AVG(throughput_rate) * AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS var_tput FROM base GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) SELECT b._timestamp, b.facility_zone, b.operation_mode, b.throughput_rate, s.mu, s.var_tput, ROUND((b.throughput_rate - s.mu) * (b.throughput_rate - s.mu) / NULLIF(s.var_tput, 0), 3) AS sq_dev_ratio FROM base b JOIN stats s ON b.facility_zone = s.facility_zone AND b.operation_mode = s.operation_mode WHERE s.var_tput > 0 ORDER BY sq_dev_ratio DESC LIMIT 15

WITH ranked AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL), top3 AS (SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3) SELECT 'top' AS segment, facility_zone, pallet_id, throughput_rate, rn FROM top3 UNION ALL SELECT 'bottom' AS segment, ranked.facility_zone, ranked.pallet_id, ranked.throughput_rate, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE ranked.rn > (SELECT MAX(rn) - 3 FROM ranked r2 WHERE r2.facility_zone = ranked.facility_zone) ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, segment ASC, rn ASC

WITH lane_activity AS (SELECT conveyor_lane, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS events FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY conveyor_lane, facility_zone), global_avg AS (SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST(events AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_events FROM lane_activity), above_avg AS (SELECT la.conveyor_lane, la.facility_zone, la.events, ga.avg_events, ROUND(CAST(la.events AS FLOAT) - ga.avg_events, 2) AS diff_from_avg FROM lane_activity la CROSS JOIN global_avg ga WHERE la.events > ga.avg_events) SELECT * FROM above_avg ORDER BY diff_from_avg DESC

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS zone_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.facility_zone ORDER BY t1.throughput_rate DESC) AS rank_by_zone, zs.zone_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN zone_stats zs ON t1.facility_zone = zs.facility_zone WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, rank_by_zone ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, avg_tput, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY avg_tput DESC) AS rnk FROM (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode) inner_agg) ranked_agg WHERE rnk <= 2 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rnk ASC

SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id AS pallet_a, t2.pallet_id AS pallet_b, t1.facility_zone, ABS(t1.throughput_rate - t2.throughput_rate) AS tput_diff FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN "{stream}" t2 ON t1.facility_zone = t2.facility_zone AND t1._timestamp < t2._timestamp AND t1.pallet_id != t2.pallet_id WHERE t1.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND t2.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tput_diff ASC LIMIT 12

WITH temp_classified AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN cell_temp >= 22.0 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END AS temp_class FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL), class_summary AS (SELECT facility_zone, temp_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp FROM temp_classified GROUP BY facility_zone, temp_class), pivot AS (SELECT facility_zone, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='HIGH' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS high_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='MEDIUM' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS med_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN temp_class='LOW' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS low_cnt FROM class_summary GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT *, ROUND(CAST(high_cnt AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(high_cnt + med_cnt + low_cnt, 0) * 100.0, 2) AS high_pct FROM pivot ORDER BY high_pct DESC

SELECT t1.facility_zone, t1.sorter_model, t1.avg_tput, t1.avg_load FROM (SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model) t1 WHERE t1.avg_tput > (SELECT ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) * 0.8, 2) FROM "{stream}") AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone AND t2.charge_remaining < 20.0) ORDER BY t1.avg_tput DESC

WITH mode_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS peer_count FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), zone_load AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS zone_avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t1._timestamp, t1.pallet_id, t1.facility_zone, t1.throughput_rate, t1.operation_mode, t1.cell_temp, mc.peer_count, zl.zone_avg_load FROM "{stream}" t1 JOIN mode_counts mc ON t1.facility_zone = mc.facility_zone AND t1.operation_mode = mc.operation_mode JOIN zone_load zl ON t1.facility_zone = zl.facility_zone WHERE mc.peer_count >= 2 ORDER BY t1.facility_zone ASC, t1.throughput_rate DESC

WITH chain_builder AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, runtime_hours, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY runtime_hours ASC) AS seq, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone) AS zone_cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL), chains AS (SELECT facility_zone, pallet_id, runtime_hours, seq, zone_cnt, CASE WHEN seq < zone_cnt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_next FROM chain_builder) SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS chain_count, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_hours FROM chains GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY chain_count DESC

WITH extracted AS (SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'batch ([A-Z0-9]+)'), 1) AS batch_id, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'segment ([0-9]+)'), 1) AS segment_nbr, array_extract(regexp_match(event_detail, 'track ([A-Za-z0-9-]+)'), 1) AS track_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE event_detail LIKE '%sorter batch%'), with_batch_flag AS (SELECT _timestamp, batch_id, sorter_model, segment_nbr, track_id, CASE WHEN array_extract(regexp_match(track_id, '([A-Z]+)'), 1) = 'TRK' THEN 'batch' ELSE 'non batch' END AS is_batch, concat('srt', lpad(CAST(segment_nbr AS VARCHAR), 5, '0'), '#', track_id) AS sorterWithTrackId FROM extracted), recovered_status AS (SELECT wbf.batch_id, wbf.sorter_model, wbf.segment_nbr, wbf.track_id, wbf.is_batch, wbf.sorterWithTrackId, CASE WHEN ack.ack_detail IS NOT NULL AND ack.ack_detail != '' THEN 'received' ELSE 'notreceived' END AS ack_status FROM with_batch_flag wbf LEFT JOIN (SELECT ack_detail FROM "{stream}" WHERE ack_detail IS NOT NULL AND ack_detail != '' AND str_match_ignore_case(ack_detail, 'ACK batch')) ack ON ack.ack_detail LIKE concat('%batchIdList:%', wbf.batch_id, '%') WHERE wbf.is_batch = 'batch') SELECT array_agg('batch_id-' || batch_id || ', sorter_model-' || sorter_model || ', segment_nbr-' || segment_nbr || ', track_id-' || track_id || ', is_batch-' || is_batch || ', sorterWithTrackId-' || sorterWithTrackId || ', ack_status-' || ack_status) AS results, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM recovered_status HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT dependency, statuscode FROM (SELECT array_extract(regexp_match(log_message, 'responseCode:\\W(?<statuscode>[^,]+)'), 1) AS statuscode, array_extract(regexp_match(log_message, 'name: [A-Z]+\\W(https:\\/\\/[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+\\/[a-zA-Z0-9\\/-]+)'), 1) AS dependency FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(log_message, 'service.api.warehouse.com')) GROUP BY dependency, statuscode

expected.note: Subquery in FROM with regexp named groups, str_match_ignore_case

queries.sql: SELECT page_slug, "key", SUM(cnt) AS cnt FROM (   SELECT page_slug, visitor_session_id AS "key", COUNT(*) AS cnt   FROM "{stream}"   WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'itemPage')     AND uri_path LIKE '%api%'     AND (visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL AND visitor_session_id != 'null')     AND (lower(graphql_operation) IN (       'updateitems','placeorder','verifypayment','updatecart','createaccount'     ))     AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%bot%'     AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%test%'   GROUP BY "key", page_slug, geo_country, geo_user_type   HAVING ((geo_user_type IS NULL OR geo_user_type != 'hosting') AND geo_country = 'US' AND COUNT(*) > 1)     OR ((geo_user_type = 'hosting' OR geo_country != 'US') AND COUNT(*) > 0) ) sub GROUP BY page_slug, "key" ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT page_slug, "key", SUM(cnt) AS cnt
FROM (
  SELECT page_slug, visitor_session_id AS "key", COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'itemPage')
    AND uri_path LIKE '%api%'
    AND (visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL AND visitor_session_id != 'null')
    AND (lower(graphql_operation) IN (
      'updateitems','placeorder','verifypayment','updatecart','createaccount',
      'getinventory','createcontract','createcreditcard','createdeliveryaddress',
      'updatequantity','movesfltocart'
    ))
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%bot%'
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%test%'
    AND lower(user_agent_str) NOT LIKE '%curl%'
  GROUP BY "key", page_slug, geo_country, geo_user_type
  HAVING ((geo_user_type IS NULL OR geo_user_type != 'hosting') AND geo_country = 'US' AND COUNT(*) > 1)
    OR ((geo_user_type = 'hosting' OR geo_country != 'US') AND COUNT(*) > 0)
) sub
GROUP BY page_slug, "key"
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT graphql_operation, COALESCE(visitor_session_id, 'N/A') AS visitor_session_id, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment'
  AND (passthrough_flag <> 'true')
  AND (passthrough_flag <> '')
  AND (passthrough_flag IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((visitor_session_id NOT IN ('sess_001', 'sess_003') OR visitor_session_id IS NULL))
  AND ((NOT (LOWER(user_agent_str) LIKE 'curl%') OR user_agent_str IS NULL))
  AND (info_tag IS NULL OR info_tag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY graphql_operation, visitor_session_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 1)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH base AS (
  SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, sorter_model,
    operation_mode, throughput_rate, load_factor, cell_temp
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE load_factor > 10.0
    AND throughput_rate >= 100.0
),
aggregated AS (
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
    MAX(load_factor) AS max_load,
    MIN(cell_temp) AS min_temp
  FROM base
  GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
)
SELECT a.facility_zone, a.sorter_model, a.operation_mode,
  a.cnt, a.avg_throughput, a.max_load, a.min_temp
FROM aggregated a
ORDER BY a.avg_throughput DESC, a.cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, operation_mode,
    throughput_rate, load_factor,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY facility_zone
      ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE load_factor > 20.0
)
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  MAX(load_factor) AS max_load
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY avg_throughput DESC

WITH combined_data AS (
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, 'high_tput' AS source
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE throughput_rate >= 500.0 AND load_factor > 20.0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, 'low_tput' AS source
  FROM "{stream}"
  WHERE throughput_rate < 200.0 AND load_factor > 20.0
)
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, source,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load
FROM combined_data
GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model, source
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT facility_zone, op_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(avg_tput) AS overall_avg_tput,
  SUM(cnt_rows) AS total_rows
FROM (
  SELECT facility_zone, op_mode,
    AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_tput,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_rows
  FROM (
    SELECT facility_zone,
      CASE
        WHEN operation_mode = 'auto' THEN 'AUTO'
        WHEN operation_mode = 'manual' THEN 'MANUAL'
        ELSE 'OTHER'
      END AS op_mode,
      throughput_rate, load_factor
    FROM "{stream}"
    WHERE load_factor > 10.0
  ) inner_q
  GROUP BY facility_zone, op_mode
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
) mid_q
GROUP BY facility_zone, op_mode
ORDER BY overall_avg_tput DESC
